description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the themattrix/tox Docker image. Set a before_script that runs `pyenv global $(pyenv global | grep "^3.5")` and installs development dependencies with `pip install -r requirements_dev.txt`. Define a single stage named static_check and a job called static_check that runs in this stage and executes `flake8 .`. No caches, artifacts, services, or special rules are needed.
